---
id: show-datasets
title: "Show datasets"
description: "Shows the datasets identified by the provided `datasetIds`, making them visible in default list results again."
sidebar_label: "Show datasets"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: platform-api//seqera-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Show datasets"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/datasets/show"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Shows the datasets identified by the provided `datasetIds`, making them visible in default list results again.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
